problem_statement:
Title: W1 2025 - Bug Bash IV [Sustainability] Value Chain Tracking Enablement
Repro Steps:
Open the Sustainability Setup page Keep all fields in the Procurement FastTab disabled Enable the 'Enable Value Chain Tracking' field ===RESULT=== Only the 'Enable Value Chain Tracking' field has been enabled ===EXTECTED RESULT=== Enabling this field, it will also enable the following fields if they are not previously enabled: Use Emissions in Purchase Documents Item Emissions Resource Emissions Work/Machine Center Emissions
Description:
This is small improvement. You cannot use Value Chain tracking enabled if you didn't previously enable the following options: Use Emissions in Purchase Documents Item Emissions Resource Emissions Work/Machine Center Emissions So, just enable them when you enable the Enable Value Chain Tracking field if these fields are not previously already enabled.

Title: [Shopify] Suggest payments matches non-success (pending, failed...) transactions
Repro Steps:

Description:

Title: Shopify: Payment terms in sales order: we don't use DueAt from Shopify but calculate based on Payment Terms from Customer
Repro Steps:
Shopify Admin. Create order for any product, any customer with payment terms +7 days; Create order for any product, any customer with payment terms = on fulfilment Create order for any product, any customer with payment terms = fixed date (select some other date, like Jan 31) (you can use my new store andreipa5 and orders 1012, 1013, 1014) Connect Shopify to BC Import orders. If needed manually map customer to 10000 (any). Manually map items to 1896-s (any). Create sales orders in Business Central. Inspect Due Dates for orders. - Due date will be the same +30days (from Payment Terms defined in Customer card). ExpectedDue dates for 1 and 3 should come from Shopify (overwrite the calculated) Ok to keep 2nd as is. We can receive DueAt via payment scehdules (it looks like there can be more than one, but we just take 1)query OrdersDueAt { shop { name } orders(first: 3, reverse: true) { edges { node { id name paymentTerms { dueInDays paymentSchedules(first: 10) { edges { node { dueAt } } } paymentTermsName paymentTermsType } } } } }Response{ "data": { "shop": { "name": "andreipa-teststore5" }, "orders": { "edges": [ { "node": { "id": "gid://shopify/Order/5942701523167", "name": "#1014", "paymentTerms": { "dueInDays": null, "paymentSchedules": { "edges": [ { "node": { "dueAt": "2025-01-31T08:12:22Z" } } ] }, "paymentTermsName": "Fixed", "paymentTermsType": "FIXED" } } }, { "node": { "id": "gid://shopify/Order/5941693972703", "name": "#1013", "paymentTerms": { "dueInDays": null, "paymentSchedules": { "edges": [] }, "paymentTermsName": "Due on fulfillment", "paymentTermsType": "FULFILLMENT" } } }, { "node": { "id": "gid://shopify/Order/5941693382879", "name": "#1012", "paymentTerms": { "dueInDays": 30, "paymentSchedules": { "edges": [ { "node": { "dueAt": "2025-02-05T14:51:45Z" } } ] }, "paymentTermsName": "Net 30", "paymentTermsType": "NET" } } } ] } }, "extensions": { "cost": { "requestedQueryCost": 19, "actualQueryCost": 13, "throttleStatus": { "maximumAvailable": 2000, "currentlyAvailable": 1908, "restoreRate": 100 } } } }
Description:
